signin.title: Sign in to continue
signin.subtitle: Your checkout will resume automatically after account access.
method.stripe_desc: You'll enter your card details on Stripe's secure checkout page — VisaClear never sees or stores your card number. Every payment is automatically screened for fraud and stolen-card risk before it's charged.
method.local_desc: No international card? Pay once with a local method instead. These don't renew automatically — we'll remind you before it's time to pay again.
referral.title: Referral code
summary.title: Order Summary
toast.incomplete: Please complete the payment method details.
toast.checkout_error: Could not start checkout. Please try again.
